name: rotate_none
description: Reference-parity: rigid rotations recovered from real-engine acen=none rotate drags (varied selection / drag start / angle / axis). Each case selects the cluster by coords and replays the recovered rigid rotation via rotate_about (explicit axis/angle/pivot through /api/transform); expected pairs are the engine's actual post-op vertices.

input.argstring: prim.cube cenX:0 cenY:0 cenZ:0 sizeX:1 sizeY:1 sizeZ:1 segmentsX:2 segmentsY:2 segmentsZ:2 radius:0
